title: AIDRA — Orbital Latency
description: End-to-end latency analysis: from sensor acquisition to result available on ground, with and without OBDP.

panels.title: Speedup Factor (OBDP vs Traditional)
panels.description: Latency improvement factor: how many times faster the system is with OBDP.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latency_data AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(inference_ms) / 1000.0 / 60.0 AS avg_processing_min,
        AVG(image_size_mb) AS avg_image_mb
    FROM execution_log
    WHERE status = 'success'
        AND inference_ms IS NOT NULL
        AND image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
),
traditional AS (
    -- Traditional: wait for ground station (avg 360 min) + downlink full image (X-band 50Mbps) + ground processing (30 min)
    SELECT
        360.0 + (l.avg_image_mb * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0) + 30.0 AS total_min_traditional
    FROM latency_data l
),
obdp AS (
    -- OBDP: process onboard (inference) + wait for ground station (avg 360 min) + downlink result JSON (~0.001 MB)
    SELECT
        l.avg_processing_min + 360.0 + (0.001 * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0) AS total_min_obdp
    FROM latency_data l
)
SELECT ROUND((t.total_min_traditional / NULLIF(o.total_min_obdp, 0))::numeric, 1) AS speedup_factor
FROM traditional t, obdp o

panels.title: Vessel Displacement During Latency
panels.description: Distance a vessel (20 knots) travels during total latency: with vs without OBDP.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latency_data AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(inference_ms) / 1000.0 / 60.0 AS avg_processing_min
    FROM execution_log
    WHERE status = 'success'
        AND inference_ms IS NOT NULL
)
-- A vessel at 20 knots = 37 km/h = 0.617 km/min
SELECT ROUND(((l.avg_processing_min + 5.0) * 0.617)::numeric, 1) AS "With OBDP (km)"
FROM latency_data l

-- Without OBDP: wait orbit (360 min) + ground processing (55 min) = 415 min
-- At 20 knots = 0.617 km/min
SELECT ROUND((415.0 * 0.617)::numeric, 0) AS "Without OBDP (km)"

SELECT ROUND(AVG(inference_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_inference_ms
FROM execution_log
WHERE status = 'success'
    AND inference_ms IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Latency Breakdown: With vs Without OBDP (Stacked Bar)
panels.description: Latency breakdown: on-board processing, orbital wait, downlink, ground processing.

targets.rawSql:
WITH avg_data AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(inference_ms) / 1000.0 / 60.0 AS proc_min,
        AVG(image_size_mb) AS img_mb
    FROM execution_log
    WHERE status = 'success'
        AND inference_ms IS NOT NULL
        AND image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
),
orbits AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('LEO 500km', 360, 10),
        ('SSO 700km (Sentinel)', 180, 12),
        ('LEO 350km (ISS-like)', 720, 7)
    ) AS t(orbit, avg_wait_min, contact_min)
)
SELECT
    o.orbit || ' - With OBDP' AS scenario,
    ROUND(a.proc_min::numeric, 2) AS "Onboard Processing (min)",
    o.avg_wait_min AS "Orbital Wait (min)",
    ROUND((0.001 * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0)::numeric, 4) AS "Downlink (min)",
    0 AS "Ground Processing (min)"
FROM avg_data a
CROSS JOIN orbits o

UNION ALL

SELECT
    o.orbit || ' - Without OBDP' AS scenario,
    0 AS "Onboard Processing (min)",
    o.avg_wait_min AS "Orbital Wait (min)",
    ROUND((a.img_mb * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0)::numeric, 2) AS "Downlink (min)",
    55 AS "Ground Processing (min)"
FROM avg_data a
CROSS JOIN orbits o

ORDER BY scenario

panels.title: Scenario Comparison Table
panels.description: Detailed comparison by orbit × downlink × processing scenario.

targets.rawSql:
WITH avg_data AS (
    SELECT
        ROUND(AVG(inference_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_inference_ms,
        ROUND(AVG(image_size_mb)::numeric, 1) AS avg_image_mb
    FROM execution_log
    WHERE status = 'success'
        AND inference_ms IS NOT NULL
        AND image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
),
orbits AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('LEO 500km', 500, 360, 10),
        ('SSO 700km', 700, 180, 12),
        ('LEO 350km', 350, 720, 7)
    ) AS t(orbit_name, altitude_km, avg_wait_min, contact_min)
),
ground_chains AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('Fast Automated', 5, 10, 2),
        ('Standard NRT', 15, 30, 10),
        ('Manual Analysis', 30, 120, 30)
    ) AS t(chain_name, ingest_min, processing_min, dissemination_min)
)
SELECT
    o.orbit_name AS "Orbit",
    o.altitude_km AS "Alt (km)",
    g.chain_name AS "Ground Chain",
    o.avg_wait_min AS "Orbital Wait (min)",
    ROUND((a.avg_inference_ms / 1000.0 / 60.0)::numeric, 2) AS "Onboard Proc (min)",
    ROUND((a.avg_image_mb * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0)::numeric, 2) AS "Full Image DL (min)",
    g.ingest_min + g.processing_min + g.dissemination_min AS "Ground Proc (min)",
    o.avg_wait_min + ROUND((a.avg_image_mb * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0)::numeric, 2) + g.ingest_min + g.processing_min + g.dissemination_min AS "Total Without OBDP (min)",
    ROUND((a.avg_inference_ms / 1000.0 / 60.0)::numeric, 2) + o.avg_wait_min AS "Total With OBDP (min)",
    ROUND((
        (o.avg_wait_min + (a.avg_image_mb * 8.0 / 50.0 / 60.0) + g.ingest_min + g.processing_min + g.dissemination_min)
        / NULLIF((a.avg_inference_ms / 1000.0 / 60.0) + o.avg_wait_min, 0)
    )::numeric, 1) AS "Speedup"
FROM avg_data a
CROSS JOIN orbits o
CROSS JOIN ground_chains g
ORDER BY o.altitude_km, g.ingest_min
